headlines.description: — Coach Zac Taylor had an inkling it might be a good day for the Cincinnati Bengals when Joe Burrow connected with Tyler Boyd on a deep ball for a touchdown early in the game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow, Bengals strike fast, blow by Falcons 35-17

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott made sure to remember what he watched during the five games the star quarterback missed with a fractured right thumb.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cowboys lean on defense in Prescott's return, top Lions 24-6

headlines.description: — The Tennessee Titans are so banged up that even quarterback Ryan Tannehill now is in a walking boot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Titans sweep Colts for 2nd straight season with 19-10 win

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Washington Commanders

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers finished the game face down on the turf after sailing a lateral out of bounds on a frantic, failed final play.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aaron Rodgers, Packers lose to Commanders, drop 3rd in a row

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — Tom Brady hasn't been in this position in two decades — a game under .500 this far into the NFL season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady, Bucs drop under .500 with shocking loss to Panthers

events.name: New York Giants at Jacksonville Jaguars

headlines.description: — The New York Giants' latest nail-biter came down to the final play — and the final few inches before the goal line.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giants stop Jaguars at 1-yard line for 23-17 win, get to 6-1

headlines.description: — Gus Edwards scored two touchdowns in his long-awaited return, staking Baltimore to a double-digit lead in the second half.
headlines.shortLinkText: This time Ravens hold on late, 23-20 against Cleveland

events.name: New York Jets at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — The New York Jets didn't feel much like celebrating their 16-9 escape of the punchless Denver Broncos on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hall hurt after 62-yard TD in Jets' 16-9 win over Broncos

events.name: Houston Texans at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — The way Josh Jacobs is running, the Las Vegas Raiders’ offensive line is going to have a nice Christmas.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Jacobs rushes for 3 TDs, Raiders beat Texans 38-20

events.name: Seattle Seahawks at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Expected by many to end up in the NFC West basement, the Seattle Seahawks instead are leading the division after seven weeks.
headlines.shortLinkText: Walker, Goodwin lead Seahawks to 37-23 win over Chargers

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at San Francisco 49ers

headlines.description: — Falling into an early hole was just what the Kansas City Chiefs needed to get going.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patrick Mahomes' 3 TDs lead Chiefs past 49ers 44-23

headlines.description: — Miami Dolphins coach Mike McDaniel wanted his team to generate more turnovers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tua, Dolphins survive scoreless 2nd half to beat Steelers
